title: Zapier changing statuses to numbers
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have been seeing this a lot recently where zapier is changing statuses in monday to numbers and I am not sure why. I was wondering if anyone has seen this before?

posts.author: Maximus (Marc Hemsley)
posts.cookedHtml:
